# Color System Reference

*Source: Live WP Theme Options API*
*Auto-generated by sync script. Do not edit manually.*

---

## Available Background Colors

| CSS Class | Label | Hex Value | Type | Strategic Use |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `bg-default` | Default | #ffffff | basic | White/light neutral — body content, text-heavy areas |
| `bg-primary` | primary | #1d47ed | basic | Brand blue — authority sections, key value propositions |
| `bg-primary-green` | primary-green | #dcf96b | basic | Yellow-green accent — warm highlights, secondary features |
| `bg-primary-dark` | primary-dark | #112887 | basic | Dark blue — high-contrast CTAs, Contact sections |
| `bg-light-yellow` | light-yellow | #faf9f4 | basic | Soft yellow — gentle highlights, testimonials, warmth |

## Available Text Colors

| CSS Class | Label | Hex Value | Use With |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `text-default` | Default | #000000 | `bg-default`, `bg-primary-green`, `bg-light-yellow` |
| `text-primary` | primary | #1d47ed | `bg-default`, `bg-primary-green`, `bg-light-yellow` (accent blue text) |
| `text-white` | white | #FFFFFF | `bg-primary`, `bg-primary-dark` (light text on dark backgrounds) |

## Valid Contrast Combinations

Use ONLY these combinations to ensure WCAG AA compliance:

| Background | Text Color | Contrast | Status |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `bg-default` | `text-default` | High | SAFE |
| `bg-default` | `text-primary` | High | SAFE |
| `bg-primary` | `text-white` | High | SAFE |
| `bg-primary-dark` | `text-white` | High | SAFE |
| `bg-primary-green` | `text-default` | Medium-High | SAFE |
| `bg-light-yellow` | `text-default` | Medium-High | SAFE |
| `bg-primary` | `text-default` | Low | AVOID |
| `bg-primary-green` | `text-white` | Low | AVOID |
| `bg-light-yellow` | `text-white` | Low | AVOID |

## Color Rhythm Guidelines

- Never use 3+ consecutive sections with the same background color.
- Reserve `bg-primary-dark` + `text-white` for the Contact/CTA section.
- Alternate between neutral (`bg-default`) and accent backgrounds for visual rhythm.
- For Cards/TeaserBoxes with per-item colors, use 2-3 distinct accent colors across items.
